title: Complete opencode adapter — skills registration via opencode.json
description: The opencode adapter currently only writes OPENCODE.md (a single pointer file). It does not register skills so they appear via / in opencode. mesh init should always scaffold opencode.json with skills.paths pointing to .agents/skills, and mesh adapter install opencode should do the same for existing repos. This ensures that when a user opens a mesh-init'd repo in opencode, all 17 agent-mesh skills are automatically available.
acceptance_criteria: mesh init always creates opencode.json with $schema and skills.paths: [".agents/skills"]
mesh adapter install opencode creates/updates opencode.json with skills path (idempotent, preserves existing config)
skill_install_status("opencode", ...) checks opencode.json exists and contains the skills path
mesh doctor validates opencode.json exists when opencode is in the adapter list
mesh skill list shows installed for opencode when opencode.json is present
Existing OPENCODE.md is kept as a complementary artifact (not removed)
Tests cover: init creates opencode.json, adapter install is idempotent, doctor validates missing, skill list status
